heading: A simple path from idea to finished design.
subheading: Clear previews, easy corrections, and final files ready for use.

steps.title: Share Your Idea
steps.description: Send the occasion, content, size, photos, references, and deadline.

steps.title: Design Preview
steps.description: Review a polished draft prepared for your event, brand, or print need.

steps.title: Final Corrections
steps.description: Request small edits so the layout, names, dates, and details are accurate.

steps.title: Print / Delivery / Digital Handover
steps.description: Receive final artwork for printing, sharing, or studio production.
